items.name: FIFA World Cup 26™ Trionda Pro Ball
items.description:
The seamless official match ball of the 2026 FIFA World Cup™ by adidas.

The legendary "La Ola" wave is a spectacular sight, first seen at sporting events across the Americas; now it has inspired the flowing, four-panel design of the adidas Trionda Pro Ball. The official ball of the 2026 FIFA World Cup™ features a seamless surface with a striking texture and strategically placed embossing for optimal precision and stability in flight. Bold colors and distinctive national symbols represent the tournament's three host countries.
